summary: Batch 1 (pages 51-100): devotional-in-christ through psychology-autonomy-illusion. All 50 pages passed static layout analysis. Checks performed: viewport meta tag presence, global.css/nav.js inclusion, inline fixed widths, CSS fixed widths without max-width, image overflow risk, iframe responsiveness, grid/flex overflow, table responsiveness, hero padding for nav overlap, SVG sizing, pre/code overflow handling. Decorative ::before/::after pseudo-elements with fixed widths are safely contained by overflow:hidden parents. No real layout issues detected.
